spec.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment') AS `deployment.environment`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'mysql.uptime'
GROUP BY `deployment.environment`

SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'mysql.instance.endpoint') as `mysql.instance.endpoint`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'mysql.uptime'
GROUP BY `mysql.instance.endpoint`

display.name: Count of table I/O wait events
